title: papaver dubium subsp. lecoqii
intro: Papaver dubium subsp. lecoqii is a subspecies of the lesser meadow poppy plant, a flowering perennial native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Papaver dubium subsp. lecoqii are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
